name: Tukar Tambah Nasib
overview: The life of Naya, a minimarket cashier girl, is often plagued by unfortunate and unlucky events. Until one day, she receives an interesting offer from a mysterious shop to swap the path of her fate with the destiny of others.

trailers.title: Official Trailer 'Tukar Tambah Nasib' | 7 Desember 2023 di Prime Video
